PAPER ONLY вЂ” NAV is notional, no capital, no on-chain actions. Engine reused unchanged (book.py / sim.py, adversarially reviewed); live layer = feed + state + scanner + breaker.
вљ  FX_CLOSED вЂ” no_bars (FX-closed?). The agent is holding (no recenter / no reallocation) on this state.

Delta-hedge overlay вЂ” paper short-EUR (a Sharpe trade, not a yield trade)

Hedged NAV
$10,520.20
vs naked $10,506.90 (+13.30) В· directional vol 7.8% в†’ 7.6% В· Sharpe 29.05 в†’ 30.64 В· forward-only, single-vol
naked EUR delta
+56.0%
hedged residual
-9.6%
residual в‰€ 0 at each sizing; the LP's gamma drifts it to ~В±16% of book just before the next В±1% rehedge (the disclosed, un-removed drift).
Оі-residual (the un-hedgeable LVR, в€’1% ref move): $-8.37 вЂ” the hedge removes DELTA, never LVR (gamma unhedgeable onchain).
short notional$6,559entry mid1.13291
hedge P&L$+16.71realized$+56.20
rehedges4perp cost$3.41
carrybooked at 0bandВ±1% EUR move
Neutral at each sizing, drifts with gamma between rehedges вЂ” not continuously neutral. Sized to the LP's live EUR $-delta (~49% of book), marked on the LP's own mid (single feed). Carry booked at 0; any + carry is upside. Paper only вЂ” no venue, no funds: basis between the legs is 0 by construction (same mid), not in reality (a real Ostium short carries ~7.6bp EURC-vs-spot residual the paper model omits).

Scanner вЂ” net-APR ranking (this tick)

pooltierL-sharegrossLVRnet APR
вЂ”
Ranks on NET (gross fee в€’ parametric LVR), fee_share in v3 L-units (F2). Reallocates only past the switch-cost hurdle (payback в‰¤30d + 50bp hysteresis). Mostly declines at $10k вЂ” the edge is structural. вљ‘ screened pools (TVL < $300k) are watched but not allocated вЂ” their volume/TVL implies a wash-inflated APR a $10k LP can't actually earn.

Data-quality lamps

в—Џ breaker: FX_CLOSED
в—Џ Pyth FV: stale (FX-closed)
в—Џ midв‰€Pyth: n/a
в—Џ Пѓ: 6.5% (2y prior)
в—Џ gas: 0.0060 gwei
в—Џ last tick: 2026-06-27 11:46:41Z
в—Џ hedge neutrality: residual 9.6% of book

в—Џ conservation: 8 identities + sign self-test, fail-closed
live_render.py В· EUR/USD on Base В· band В±3% В· Пѓ blended (2y prior shrinking toward run-realized TWAP vol, F3) В· fee_share in v3 L-units (F2) В· LVR parametric @ Пѓ (diagnostic, not subtracted from NAV) В· basis a discrete realloc cost (F4) В· TWAP mark via observe() (F1) В· self-healing block cursor (F5) В· two baselines (F8).
Reuses book.py (LP primitives) В· sim.py (Elsts geometry, Ledger) В· pyth.py (FV) В· live_mid.py (Base RPC). Paper only.
